title: Coder: A simple way to make web stuff on Raspberry Pi.

description: A little experiment from a couple of us at Google. Coder is a free piece of open source software that turns a Raspberry Pi into a simple, lightweight beginner-friendly place to build real stuff for the web. Learn more at goo.gl/coder
fulltitle: Coder: A simple way to make web stuff on Raspberry Pi.
